name: Ham & Cheese Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard or spicy mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Follow the recipe for Basic Crispy Potato Skins.
3. Brush the insides of potato skins with mustard.
4. Drain and slice peppers or pimientos.
5. Top each skin with slices of ham and a few strips of pepper/pimiento.
6. Sprinkle cheese over the top.
7. Bake on a baking sheet for about 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbling.
8. If desired, sprinkle with parsley before serving.
Makes about 2 skins per serving.
